'''Mandroxan''' was a criminal alliance formed by the [[Anavill Smuggler's Guild]], the [[Droxian Traders League]], and [[Manliss Enterprise]]. [[Artur Manliss]], head of Manliss Enterprise, operated as the cartel's de facto leader in its illegal production and transportation of [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. With a number of carefully places bribes and an impressive security force, Mandroxan [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] operated with impunity, eventually controlling the spice trade in twenty-three [[Star system/Legends|systems]] in the [[Portmoak sector/Legends|Portmoak sector]]. [[Mandroxan Exports]] was a subsidiary company of the Cartel, producing weapons for them.
